title: thelypteris rodigasiana
intro: Thelypteris rodigasiana, also known as the Philippine maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to the Philippines and other parts of Asia. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris rodigasiana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris rodigasiana include decoctions, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to soothe and calm the skin, as well as to treat various health ailments.
